ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2020 Off Calendar

Motion For Relief From Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-19-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE VIA ZOOM:
JOHN CHAMBERS (510-872-1454) Defendant in propria persona.
No other appearances.

Discussed re: the court's tentative ruling, Defendant may re-file to set on the court's calendar and re-serve with proper notice. The Court instructs Mr. Chambers to check the court's website. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JOHN CHAMBERS Motion For Relief From Judgment is Off calendar. Defendant did not file and serve the motion at least 16 court days before the hearing, as required by Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b).

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR#5041, email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. =(302/EPS)
